meaning: adj.(=dogmatic) 教义的,教理的,武断的
examples: Dogmatical denying it or blindly extolling it cant alleviate this contradiction.
From the two principal parts of our nature, Reason and Passion, have proceeded two kinds of learning, mathematical and dogmatical.
In fact, if you wish to instruct others, a positive and dogmatical manner in advancing your sentiments may occasion opposition and prevent a candid attention.
